title: Isonandra malaccensis
taxonomy: Isonandra malaccensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It belongs to the genus Isonandra, which is a group of flowering plants. The species Isonandra malaccensis is native to Southeast Asia. The classification of Isonandra malaccensis reflects its botanical relationships with other plants in the Sapotaceae family. Further study is needed to confirm its exact classification within the plant kingdom.
